name: mpi-example
description: A generic MPI master-worker pattern demonstrating dynamic load balancing and task distribution. The master node discovers input files from a mounted directory, distributes them to worker nodes for parallel processing, collects results, and generates a summary report. Ideal for embarrassingly parallel workloads such as batch file processing, data transformation, and independent task execution.

actions.name: process_files
actions.description: Processes input files in parallel using MPI master-worker pattern. Master node discovers all files in input directory /app/inputs/*, distributes them to worker nodes for processing, and collects results. Each worker reads file content, parses numbers, computes statistics, and returns results. Final output is written to /app/outputs/results.txt with detailed processing summary.

num_processes.description: Total number of MPI processes (1 master + N-1 workers). Must be at least 2.
